mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material (user_id, topic_id, material_type, status, title, description, raw_content, source_url, file_key, comment, score, invalid_reason, inbox_at, collected_at, archived_at, invalid_at, last_retrieved_at, is_deleted, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{topicId}, #{materialType}, #{status}, #{title}, #{description}, #{rawContent}, #{sourceUrl}, #{fileKey}, #{comment}, #{score}, #{invalidReason}, #{inboxAt}, #{collectedAt}, #{archivedAt}, #{invalidAt}, #{lastRetrievedAt}, #{isDeleted}, #{deletedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM material WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
